sectionIntro: Premium IV drips and vitamin injections, customized to your wellness goals. Prices are starting points and may vary based on your personalized consultation.

ivDrips.name: The Myers' Cocktail
ivDrips.description: Our signature blend of B-complex, B12, vitamin C, magnesium, and calcium to restore energy, support immunity, and help you feel revitalized.

ivDrips.name: Immune Boost Drip
ivDrips.description: High-dose vitamin C, zinc, and antioxidants formulated to strengthen your immune defenses and help you recover faster.

ivDrips.name: Hydration Recovery Drip
ivDrips.description: Replenishing electrolytes and fluids to rehydrate, ease fatigue, and refresh you after travel, illness, or a demanding week.

ivDrips.name: Beauty & Glow Drip
ivDrips.description: Biotin, glutathione, and vitamin C to nourish skin, hair, and nails from within and support a radiant, healthy glow.

injections.name: Vitamin B12 Injection
injections.description: A quick energy and metabolism boost to fight fatigue and support a healthy nervous system.

injections.name: Lipo-Mino Slim Shot
injections.description: A blend of lipotropic nutrients and amino acids designed to support metabolism and complement your wellness goals.

injections.name: Glutathione Injection
injections.description: A master antioxidant that supports detoxification, skin brightening, and overall cellular wellness.

injections.name: Vitamin D Injection
injections.description: Support immune health, mood, and bone strength with a targeted vitamin D boost.
